untestedRules.usage: Attribute is rendered only when the component is disabled.

rule.usage: Keeps button in focus order while indicating it is not interactive. Use `[disabled]` attribute to remove from focus order entirely.

violations.element:
<button aria-label="Send prompt" class="k-button k-button-sm k-rounded-full k-disabled k-icon-button" disabled="">
                            <span class="k-button-icon k-icon k-svg-icon k-svg-i-arro
